resources.string: Your encrypted vault will appear here. Card list arrives in Phase 3.
Auto-lock, PIN and backup controls arrive in Phases 4–5.
Set up a screen lock first
Your vault key lives in this device\'s secure hardware, which requires a screen lock (PIN, pattern or password). Set one up, then come back.
6 digits. This unlocks your vault when biometrics aren\'t available.
Those PINs didn\'t match. Start again.
Confirm your screen lock once to finish creating your encrypted vault.
Use your fingerprint, face or screen lock
Too many attempts. Try again in %1$d seconds.
Biometric setup changed on this device, so biometric unlock is off. Use your PIN.
Your vault data is unreadable. Restore from a backup when backups arrive, or erase and start over.
